name: SEL Manufacturing Company Limited
summary: SEL Manufacturing Company Limited, an integrated textile company, engages in the spinning, knitting, and processing of yarns and fabrics in India and internationally. The company offers cotton combed/carded knitting yarns, slub yarns, organic cotton yarns, poly/cotton blends, TFO double yarns, elitwist yarns, compact yarns, polyester/viscose blended yarns, cotton/modal blends, cotton bamboo blends, zero twist yarns, and melange yarns. It also provides terry towels, including beach, bath, kitchen, Christmas, and embroidered/embellished towels, as well as terry made ups; and readymade garments, such as T-shirts, tops, inner wears, night suits, boxers, sweaters, etc. for men and boys, and women and girls, as well as infants, toddlers, and kids. In addition, the company offers knitted fabrics consisting of single jersey, pique, sheer jersey, interlock, waffle, ottoman, flat back rib, yarn dyed striper, mini-jacquard, electronic jacquard, velour, pointel, suede, rib, variegated rib, cotton fleece, and polyester fleece fabrics, as well as knitted garments, processed fabrics, and various kinds of yarn. SEL Manufacturing Company Limited was founded in 1969 and is based in Ludhiana, India.
